title: 🌡️ Reaction-Diffusion Systems
name: Reaction-Diffusion Systems
what_it_is: Math systems modeling how two substances interact—often creates flowing, rippling blobs like pigment spreading in water.
how_to_use: her aura is made of reaction-diffusion—fluid color pulses spreading across her form
the wall bleeds with math—reaction waves ripple like alien bio-ink
animation_behavior: Color flows in waves, reactive ripple effects, pulsing with life or thought
